root_text.sn35.152:1.1: “Sace vo, bhikkhave, aññatitthiyā paribbājakā evaṁ puccheyyuṁ:
root_text.sn35.152:1.3: Evaṁ puṭṭhā tumhe, bhikkhave, tesaṁ aññatitthiyānaṁ paribbājakānaṁ evaṁ byākareyyātha:
root_text.sn35.152:1.4: ‘dukkhassa kho, āvuso, pariññāya bhagavati brahmacariyaṁ vussatī’ti.
root_text.sn35.152:1.5: Sace pana vo, bhikkhave, aññatitthiyā paribbājakā evaṁ puccheyyuṁ:
root_text.sn35.152:1.6: ‘katamaṁ panāvuso, dukkhaṁ, yassa pariññāya samaṇe gotame brahmacariyaṁ vussatī’ti?
root_text.sn35.152:1.7: Evaṁ puṭṭhā tumhe, bhikkhave, tesaṁ aññatitthiyānaṁ paribbājakānaṁ evaṁ byākareyyātha:
root_text.sn35.152:2.9: Yampidaṁ cakkhusamphassapaccayā uppajjati vedayitaṁ sukhaṁ vā dukkhaṁ vā adukkhamasukhaṁ vā tampi dukkhaṁ;
root_text.sn35.152:2.14: yampidaṁ manosamphassapaccayā uppajjati vedayitaṁ sukhaṁ vā dukkhaṁ vā adukkhamasukhaṁ vā tampi dukkhaṁ;
root_text.sn35.152:2.18: Evaṁ puṭṭhā tumhe, bhikkhave, tesaṁ aññatitthiyānaṁ paribbājakānaṁ evaṁ byākareyyāthā”ti.

translation_text.sn35.152:0.3: What’s the Purpose of the Spiritual Life?
translation_text.sn35.152:1.1: “Mendicants, if wanderers who follow another religion were to ask you:
translation_text.sn35.152:1.2: ‘Reverends, what’s the purpose of leading the spiritual life under the ascetic Gotama?’
translation_text.sn35.152:1.4: ‘The purpose of leading the spiritual life under the Buddha is to completely understand suffering.’
translation_text.sn35.152:1.5: If wanderers of other religions were to ask you:
translation_text.sn35.152:2.2: The purpose of leading the spiritual life under the Buddha is to completely understand this.
translation_text.sn35.152:2.9: The pleasant, painful, or neutral feeling that arises dependent on eye contact is also suffering.
translation_text.sn35.152:2.10: The purpose of leading the spiritual life under the Buddha is to completely understand this.
translation_text.sn35.152:2.14: The pleasant, painful, or neutral feeling that arises dependent on mind contact is also suffering.
translation_text.sn35.152:2.15: The purpose of living the spiritual life under the Buddha is to completely understand this.
translation_text.sn35.152:2.17: The purpose of leading the spiritual life under the Buddha is to completely understand this.’
translation_text.sn35.152:2.18: When questioned by wanderers of other religions, that’s how you should answer them.”
